commits: eb02f89 - bober(sprint-2): add --run-id flag, RunSpawner, PidSidecar, spawn branch
notes: --run-id flag additive/optional threaded run.ts->runPipeline->runTsPipeline->pipelineRunId. RunSpawner uses detached:true,stdio:ignore,unref(),not awaited; writes run state.json then records pid in PidSidecar (.bober/chat/<sessionId>.pids.json). Spawn branch wired into ChatSession. All signatures backward-compatible (optional 4th opts arg). 1897 tests pass.
